description: Sebastian Derik and Janice Robbins (Agent Rebecca Stevens) meet in her apartment after feeling an inexplicable connection. Their conversation grows tense as Derik reveals they share memories and pain, ultimately killing Robbins in a ritualistic manner that mirrors Coulson's carvings. This disturbing beginning establishes the threat and sets the central mystery in motion.

transcript.line: Burning man, two years ago, we were stuck in the desert... on a glow-in-the-dark bus. Is that it?
Oh. Are you sure you're not from Iowa? Because you just sounded like it.

This is gonna drive me nuts. I mean, it's crazy, right? We see each other from across the bar, and... we just wave at each other like we're long-lost friends. I know I know you. I just can't figure out how.
To remembering. So, you're an artist.
Mm, yeah, I do some painting. And I teach community art classes. Is that how I know you? Are you an artist?
I do some carving now and then.
Well, maybe the reason we think we know each other is because it was our destiny to meet tonight.
Look... I haven't been entirely honest with you. We have met before, and I've traveled a long way to be with you.
Okay. Maybe we should just slow this down.
No. We share so much... so many memories... so much pain.
How... how... how do you know about that?
